title: Server-Sent Events (SSE) Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential real-time communication method for server-to-client updates.

questions.question: What is the primary difference between SSE and WebSockets?
options: WebSockets are only for text, and SSE is only for binary data.
SSE is uni-directional (server to client) while WebSockets are bi-directional (two-way).
SSE requires a custom protocol, and WebSockets use standard HTTP.
There is no difference between them.

questions.question: Which JavaScript object is used to create a connection to an SSE server endpoint?
Which HTTP header is required for an SSE response from the server?
SSE includes automatic reconnection features. True or False?
What is the standard text format for an SSE data message?
